FirstAid.title: SOS Psychological First Aid
FirstAid.groundingIntro: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding helps you re-anchor yourself with your senses to soothe panic.
FirstAid.jellyIntro: Squeeze the squishy jelly to release stress and anger!
FirstAid.affirmation0: Every emotional storm will eventually pass. Right now, you are safe and protected. 🕊️
FirstAid.affirmation1: You don't have to be perfect. Every tiny effort you make is already incredibly valuable. 🌱
FirstAid.affirmation2: Take a deep breath. Exhale slowly. You did so well getting through today. 💖
FirstAid.affirmation3: Fear or anxiety is just a temporary feeling, it does not define who you are. 🛡️
FirstAid.gDesc1: Focus on 5 objects you can see right now (e.g. a cup, a screen, a book, a plant...).
FirstAid.gDesc2: Feel 4 things around you (a warm blanket, a rough sleeve, a cold wooden table, or your own skin...).
FirstAid.gDesc3: Listen for 3 sounds (the hum of a fan, rain falling, birds chirping, or your own breathing...).
FirstAid.gDesc4: Try to smell 2 scents in your environment (coffee aroma, essential oils, or pages of a book...).
FirstAid.gDesc5: Become aware of 1 taste in your mouth (a sweet hint of tea, or the freshness of a sip of water...).
FirstAid.gIntroTitle: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding helps you re-anchor yourself to the present moment by connecting with your senses to soothe panic.
